pending.body: Restore backward compatibility for the stable `backend show-effective` / `backend probe` contracts. `src/contexts/agent_execution/diagnostics.rs:76-109,785-792,830-835,1712-1765` removes the stable `role == "final_reviewer"` entry, replaces it with `final_review_panel.reviewer[i]`, and rejects `--role final_reviewer`. This bead only changes backend defaults, so existing consumers that key off the documented stable DTO or probe that role will now break. Keep a compatibility `final_reviewer` row/probe path (or version the DTO/CLI) and add the per-member reviewer rows as an additive change instead of a replacement.

Fix `backend show-effective` model-source attribution for the new compiled Codex defaults. `src/contexts/workspace_governance/config.rs:1542-1546` now supplies the implementer and final-review defaults through `backends.codex.role_models.{implementer,final_reviewer}`, but `src/contexts/agent_execution/diagnostics.rs:1572-1630,1712-1745` suppresses role-model entries when their source is `Default` and falls back to the generic `"default"` label. On a fresh workspace that makes `implementer` (`gpt-5.4-high`) and `final_review_panel.reviewer[0]` (`gpt-5.4-xhigh`) report `model_source: "default"`, which points operators at the wrong control point. Return a role-model-specific default source string when the resolved model comes from a compiled `backends.<family>.role_models.<role>` default.

Unify the legacy `BackendResolver` path with the new implementer default. `src/shared/domain.rs:252-256` changes the implementer default target to `codex/gpt-5.4-high`, but `src/contexts/agent_execution/service.rs:43-92` still resets models with `ModelSpec::default_for_backend()` whenever a backend family changes. A simple `BackendResolver::resolve(Implementer, None, project=codex, workspace=claude)` now resolves to `codex/gpt-5.4`, silently dropping the required `-high` suffix. Any caller that still uses `BackendResolver` instead of `BackendPolicyService` can therefore see a different implementer default than the main workflow engine. Either teach `apply_selection` about role-specific defaults or route those callers through `BackendPolicyService`.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 5 -> Plan and Implement
